Why Microsoft Announced Ninja Theory's New Game Despite Plans to Shut the Studio Down
According to Game File, Microsoft allegedly planned to close or spin off Ninja Theory when it revealed Senua at Xbox Games Showcase, and it did so thinking that "the promise of a newly announced game would help draw investor interest in the studio."
